## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` and it passes
- [ ] My change is focused (one logical change)
- [ ] I followed the existing code style
- [ ] I did **not** commit secrets, `.env`, or `dist/`
- [ ] I did **not** add unnecessary dependencies or network calls
